commit_message:
Added support for Questa & DSim simulators; fixed compilation errors;… Added support for Questa & DSim simulators; fixed compilation errors;… … improved  build configuration

RTL Changes:
- Fix reg vs wire type mismatch in z_core_control_u.v: change 'state' from reg to wire since it's driven by continuous assignment
- Fix out-of-bounds bit-select errors in axil_gpio.v by adding N_GPIO bounds checking for all gpio and gpio_dir accesses
- Removed problematic `timescale and `include directives
